impact: The CSP middleware currently emits Report-Only headers but has no report-uri / report-to directive — violations only surface in browser DevTools, never server-side. Adding a /csp-report endpoint that logs violations to a jsonl file would let us automate before/after diffs during T-031/T-032 migrations and catch regressions earlier. ~30 lines: FastAPI route accepting application/csp-report POSTs, appending to a rotating log under /data/logs/. Reference vigilant/app/middleware/csp_nonce.py for the existing header template.
title: CSP report endpoint for violation telemetry
